error.session_restore_failed: Failed to restore session. Please log in again.
error.x_login_hint: X does not support email/password login in this app. Please use "Sign in with Google" or "Sign in with Apple" instead.
settings.title: Settings
settings.user_agent.description: Custom browser user agent string. Restart required to apply.
tutorial.welcome.title: Welcome to Uniso
tutorial.welcome.description: Manage all your social media accounts in one place. X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Bluesky, and Twitch are supported.
tutorial.add_account.title: Add an Account
tutorial.add_account.description: Click the "+" button at the bottom of the sidebar to add your social media accounts.
tutorial.switch_account.title: Switch Accounts
tutorial.switch_account.description: Click an account in the sidebar to switch views. You can also use Ctrl+Tab / Ctrl+Shift+Tab shortcuts.
tutorial.complete.title: You're All Set!
tutorial.complete.description: Start by adding your first account. You can revisit this tutorial anytime from Settings.
